281	// countOccurrences is a small test helper; we avoid strings.Count import noise here.
282	func countOccurrences(s, sub string) int {
283		count := 0
284		start := 0
285		for {
286			idx := indexFrom(s, sub, start)
287			if idx == -1 {
288				return count
289			}
290			count++
291			start = idx + len(sub)
292		}
293	}
294	
295	func indexFrom(s, sub string, start int) int {
296		if start > len(s) {
297			return -1
298		}
299		rest := s[start:]
300		for i := 0; i+len(sub) <= len(rest); i++ {
301			if rest[i:i+len(sub)] == sub {
302				return start + i
303			}
304		}
305		return -1
306	}

309	func TestInitCommand(t *testing.T) {
310		tests := []struct {
311			name        string

313			envOptions  []TestEnvOption
314			setup       func(t *testing.T, te *TestEnvironment)
315			validate    func(t *testing.T, te *TestEnvironment, output string, err error)

321				envOptions: []TestEnvOption{WithGitInit(false)},
322				validate: func(t *testing.T, te *TestEnvironment, output string, cmdErr error) {
323					// Check .ddx/config.yaml was created

325
